_comment: Copy to ~/.claude/settings.json. MCPs registered via `claude mcp add` separately — user-scope settings.json does NOT load mcpServers.
_mcp_register: POSIX: claude mcp add gemini-cli -s user -- npx -y gemini-mcp-tool && claude mcp add codex -s user -- codex mcp-server | Windows (git-bash): MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 claude mcp add gemini-cli -s user -- cmd /c npx -y gemini-mcp-tool && MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 claude mcp add codex -s user -- cmd /c codex mcp-server
_effort_note: effortLevel/alwaysThinkingEnabled OMITTED. Set per-session via settings.local.json.
